overall.description: A third-person view of a cloaked character standing on a sandy beach facing a coastal stone tower and rock formations. The scene features high-quality game engine rendering with dynamic lighting, suggesting a fantasy RPG setting. The character remains mostly stationary, observing the scenic coastal architecture and natural rock arches.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal beach with historic stone tower and natural rock arch

agents.ego_description: character stands still on the beach with slight idle movements, facing the distant stone tower and coastal scenery

large coastal cliff formation with natural archway carved by erosion
weathered wooden pier structure extending along the shoreline
jagged rock outcroppings rising from the ocean water
calm coastal water with gentle waves lapping at the shore
wet sand with patches of seaweed and tidal pools

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a sandy beach facing a scenic coastal vista. A historic stone bell tower rises in the distance against a partly cloudy sky, while a natural rock arch dominates the right side of the frame. The ocean stretches to the left with coastal rock formations visible offshore. The character remains stationary, observing the tranquil environment with only subtle idle movements and cape physics responding to the wind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, observant perspective of a cloaked character facing a tranquil coastal landscape. It begins with the character standing still on a sandy beach, their cape subtly reacting to the wind while overlooking a scenic vista. As the camera lingers, the view emphasizes the contrast between the historic stone bell tower rising in the distance and the massive natural rock arch dominating the right side of the frame. The scene then expands to reveal the vast ocean stretching to the left, where jagged coastal rock formations break the water's surface under a partly cloudy sky.
